name: narrativedesk
description: NarrativeDesk synthetic replay workbench and deterministic research kernel.

scripts.web:build: npm run web:data && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.web:smoke: npm run web:data && npm --workspace apps/web run smoke
scripts.web:verify: npm run web:build && npm run web:smoke
scripts.test:python: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest discover -s tests
scripts.verify: npm run test:python && npm run web:build && npm run web:smoke:static
scripts.web:smoke:static: npm run web:data && npm --workspace apps/web run smoke:static
